chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 666 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 3776/2022 (Condonation of Delay) 2. For orders on office objection No. 01, 12 & 25. 3. For order on CMA No. 3777/2022. (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No. 3778/2022. (stay) 12.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press the reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
